location: No fixed pickup spot — it's a random drop from Bloodfiend enemies scattered through the ruins and wrecked camp of Prospect Town (also spawns on Bloodfiends at Rivermouth Cave, Stone Coffin Fissure, and Rauh Base).
tactics: Bloodfiends are the naked, muscular humanoid enemies that lunge into grapple/bite attacks and can inflict blood loss themselves — punish after a whiffed grab rather than trading
Prospect Town has roughly six Bloodfiends spread across its ruined buildings and a nearby destroyed camp, giving the best odds against the low (~3%) drop chance
Equip the Silver Scarab talisman and eat a Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot to boost Item Discovery before farming
From Cliffroad Terminus grace, head south and climb the cloth-draped broken wall to reach the ruins where the Bloodfiends cluster
lore: The fork served the Bloodfiends as a ritual tool for offering blood to the Formless Mother — its three bone tines were meant to pierce and bleed a victim rather than kill outright, and the cultists reportedly turned it on themselves during their rites as well.

builds.name: Arcane bleed poke
builds.why: D-scaling Arcane alongside Strength/Dexterity plus a built-in blood loss buildup means it slots directly into a bleed-focused build without needing a bleed Ash of War
